allow: PowerShell($p = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".claude.json"; $j = Get-Content $p -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $m = $j.mcpServers.magic; Write-Output "=== magic server config ==="; $m | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6)
